allow: Bash(node -e "const PIXI = require\('pixi.js'\); console.log\('BaseTexture.defaultOptions:', typeof PIXI.BaseTexture.defaultOptions\); console.log\('SCALE_MODES:', PIXI.SCALE_MODES\);")
Bash(node -e "const PIXI = require\('pixi.js'\); console.log\('CanvasRenderer:', typeof PIXI.CanvasRenderer\);")

Bash(node -e "const PIXI = require\('pixi.js'\); const app = new PIXI.Application\({width:1,height:1}\); const r = app.renderer; console.log\('type:', r.type === 1 ? 'WebGL' : 'Canvas'\); console.log\('options keys:', Object.keys\(r.options || {}\)\); console.log\('context attrs:', r.gl ? r.gl.getContextAttributes\(\) : 'no gl'\); app.destroy\(\);")
